task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: Implementation is mostly correct and well-structured. The function is properly defined, auto-detection logic correctly distinguishes from Ministral 3 by checking for absence of [SYSTEM_PROMPT], LOG_DBG call is present identifying the template, and the handler is properly dispatched. System messages are handled via workaround::system_message_not_supported(). However, there is one significant deviation: the format is set to COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE (line 1639) instead of the required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY per the rubric. This is a specific, verifiable failure against an explicit requirement. All other aspects meet the rubric criteria.
